svg.title: memclaw-longrun-fleet architecture diagram
svg.desc: Architecture showing User to OpenClaw Gateway routing to three agents (sourcing, verification, synthesis) each with SOUL.md, AGENTS.md and governance skill, connecting to MemClaw MCP server, which governs a shared fleet memory pool backed by pgvector, with LLM enrichment on every write via AISA/DeepSeek-v3.

g.text: Session management · agent dispatch · MCP routing

svg.text: memclaw-governance.md loaded into every agent workspace

g.text: Row-level tenant isolation · audit trail · contradiction detection on every write
Hybrid vector + keyword search · 8-status lifecycle · crystallizer
AISA gateway · DeepSeek-v3 · LLM enrichment on every write
